vata.name: Vata
vata.summary: Vata governs all movement in the body and mind. Creative, quick-thinking, and enthusiastic when balanced. Prone to anxiety, dryness, and irregularity when imbalanced.
mentalTraits: Quick to learn, quick to forget
emotionalTraits: Quick to react, quick to recover
vata.balancedState: Creative, energetic, joyful, flexible, clear communicator, quick learner
vata.seasonalVulnerability: Late autumn and early winter (Hemanta/Shishira) — cold, dry, windy weather aggravates Vata

pitta.name: Pitta
pitta.summary: Pitta governs transformation, digestion, and metabolism. Intelligent, focused, and driven when balanced. Prone to anger, inflammation, and burnout when imbalanced.
pitta.balancedState: Intelligent, confident, courageous, strong digestion, good leader, warm personality
pitta.seasonalVulnerability: Summer and late spring (Grishma) — hot weather aggravates Pitta

kapha.name: Kapha
kapha.summary: Kapha governs structure, stability, and lubrication. Loving, patient, and grounded when balanced. Prone to lethargy, weight gain, and attachment when imbalanced.
mentalTraits: Slow to learn but excellent memory
kapha.balancedState: Loving, patient, grounded, strong immunity, steady energy, loyal, nurturing
kapha.seasonalVulnerability: Late winter and spring (Shishira/Vasanta) — cold, damp weather aggravates Kapha

vata-pitta.name: Vata-Pitta
vata-pitta.summary: Combines Vata's creativity and movement with Pitta's sharpness and drive. Quick, enthusiastic, and intellectually agile. May alternate between anxiety (Vata) and irritability (Pitta) when stressed.
vata-pitta.balancingFocus: Ground and cool — prioritize routine, warmth, and calming foods

pitta-kapha.name: Pitta-Kapha
pitta-kapha.summary: Combines Pitta's intensity with Kapha's endurance. Strong, athletic, determined, and resilient. Can be stubborn and prone to both inflammation and weight gain when imbalanced.
pitta-kapha.balancingFocus: Stay active and light — avoid heavy foods and sedentary habits

vata-kapha.name: Vata-Kapha
vata-kapha.summary: Combines Vata's creativity with Kapha's steadiness. Can be both adaptable and grounded. May struggle with cold sensitivity (both doshas are cold) and alternating between anxiety and lethargy.
keyTraits: Variable build — can be thin or heavy
vata-kapha.balancingFocus: Warmth and stimulation — prioritize warm foods, regular exercise, and consistent routine

tridoshic.name: Tridoshic (Sama Prakriti)
tridoshic.summary: Rare constitution where all three doshas are in equal balance. Generally enjoy good health and adaptability. Should follow seasonal routines to maintain balance.
tridoshic.balancingFocus: Follow seasonal (Ritucharya) guidelines as the primary guide
